message:
test(agent_mail): add comprehensive unit tests for agent_mail module

Add 28 unit tests covering:
- AgentMailClient::from_config validation (7 tests)
- InboxMessage serialization/deserialization (15 tests)
- AgentMailConfig config parsing (4 tests)
- Edge cases: unicode, large IDs, escape sequences (2 tests)

All tests run without mocks, testing real module behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
